urls.description: 面对日益增长的视觉内容需求，本n8n工作流提供了一个强大的解决方案，用于自动化生成高质量的创意广告图片。用户只需提供多张参考图像，工作流便能智能调用AI模型，融合多源信息，创作出独特且引人注目的广告素材。这不仅极大节省了设计师的时间，也为市场营销人员带来了无限的创意可能性，是内容创作和市场营销领域的理想工具。

urls.title: AI Daily Standup Builder (n8n Workflow)
urls.description: Never write a standup update manually again.This n8n workflow collects your team's GitHub activity every morning and generates an AI-powered standup recap, posted directly to Slack.What's included:- Ready-to-import n8n workflow (JSON)- AI-powered daily summary using GPT-4o-mini- Smart grouping of changes by theme- PR review alerts for stale/unreviewed PRs- Focus recommendations based on activityHow it works:Schedule Trigger (9AM) → GitHub Commits + PRs → AI Summary → SlackSetup in 3 minutes: Import JSON, add GitHub + OpenAI + Slack credentials, activate.Cost: ~/bin/bash.03/month for AI (GPT-4o-mini).

data.text:
New drop: AI Daily Standup Builder

n8n workflow that auto-generates your team standup every morning.

Pulls last 24h commits + open PRs from GitHub, feeds them to GPT-4o-mini, posts a formatted recap to Slack.

No more "what did you work on yesterday?"

CRMを導入したら業務が良くなる、と思ってた。

でも設計を詰めていくと「CRMを中心にしない方がいい」という結論に。

・営業がCRMにログインしない前提で設計
・ワークフローツール（n8n）+ AIを中心に据える
・CRMは「データの貯蔵庫」として使う

Stop building 'God-Workflows.' 🙅‍♂️ One giant automation looks cool until it breaks. 

The secret? Modular sub-workflows. 🏗️ 

Break processes into smaller blocks. If one fails, the rest keeps humming. Easier to fix and scale. 🧠💪

#n8n #Automation #AI #Efficiency https://t.co/YxzlUniKSf

作るより【設計】が難しい。

urls.title: Welcome! You are invited to join a webinar: Stop Doing the Work Claude Cowork Can Be Doing For You. After registering, you will receive a confirmation email about joining the webinar.
urls.description: Claude Cowork is not the same as Claude Chat. It is more powerful, it can automate the work, and connect with your existing platforms. ➡️ If you are wondering how, this free 30-minute event is for you. Claude Cowork lets you hand off real work to AI and get finished files back. You describe what you need in plain language, and it runs the task from start to finish, no coding, no prompting tricks, no IT team required. Literally go from idea to execution. Here's what that looks like: ✔️ Wake up to a pipeline review already written, with follow-up emails drafted for every open deal. ✔️ Redesign your entire website and get it built in less than 4 hours. ✔️ Drop in a vendor contract and get back a plain-language summary of everything you'd want your lawyer to flag. ✔️ Your team meeting prep—context, agenda, key questions—takes three minutes instead of thirty. These aren't demos. These are things we're doing inside Biggest Goal right now. Join Biggest Goal Co-Founders Alane Boyd and Micah Jo
